name: Awesome Pea 2
short_description: Greedy Pea is back in game! Dark dungeons, deadly traps, everything is green, a lot of gold everywhere!
detailed_description:
Awesome Pea 2 - next chapter of classic platformer game. Greedy Pea is back in game! Now even more dark dungeons, deadly traps and gold!

What you will definitely find in this game (again):
  • Pixel gameboy-style graphics (when everything is green)
  • 25 different levels
  • Retro soundtrack (sounds like your old computer)
  • Lots of shiny coins

supported_languages: English, Russian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Turkish, Japanese
